mapper.select:
SELECT p.id , p.name , p.contents , p.isAdmin , p.views , u.id AS userId , u.nickname AS userNickname , c.id AS categoryId , c.name AS categoryName , f.id AS fileId , f.path AS filePath , f.name AS fileName , f.extension AS fileExtension , p.createdAt FROM post p JOIN user u ON u.id = p.userId JOIN category c ON c.id = p.categoryId LEFT JOIN file f ON f.postId = p.id WHERE 1 = 1
AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND p.contents LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contents}, '%')
AND p.categoryId = #{categoryId}
AND u.userId = #{userId}
ORDER BY p.createdAt DESC, p.id DESC
ORDER BY p.createdAt, p.id
ORDER BY p.categoryId
